feed.title: Rogério Pontes
feed.subtitle: My personal page on Computer Science, Security and Privacy

entry.title: A first look at k-anonymity.
entry.summary: Introduction Hidden in the Noise (Photo by Chris Yang Unsplash) We don’t always think about the information we publicly disclose, but we are often too quick to provide private data that can uniquely identify us. Sometimes we do it as part of our civic duty such scheduling a COVID-19 Test or vaccine, but other times we do it just to subscribe to a new social media platform. In either case, th...

entry.title: ORAM? It's RAM, not RAM!
entry.summary: Can you guess where the ace of spades is? (Photo by Aditya Chinchure on Unsplash) Have you have ever read something about ORAM in a research article or a software post and quickly assumed it was only about hiding the accesses patterns of a random-access memory (RAM)? Yeah, I have, and most people might also assume the same at first glance. While it can indeed hide the access patterns of a mac...
